prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年理科最低位次约2428名，2023年约2828名，2024年因批次合并及考试模式调整出现异常波动至约9966名，2025年恢复至约4704名（物理类）。近三年位次整体呈后移趋势，2025年基准位次约4704名；该校在宁夏理科/物理类招生计划：2022年31人、2023年31人、2024年28人、2025年33人、2026年35人。2026年较2025年扩招2人（+6.1%），扩招幅度温和，对竞争有一定加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 武汉理工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第54名，近年排名稳中有升（2021年55→2025年48→2026年54），属于中上水平211院校；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（南湖校区周边监测到不明巨型生物活动），可能对考生报考心理产生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度排名第98（一般），短视频平台曝光度不高，无明显热度助推；第五轮学科评估中，材料科学与工程获评A，交通运输工程、机械工程获评A-。材料学科为该校王牌，与招生专业中的材料类、机械类、交通运输类等直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程为高热推荐；土木建筑、生化环材、机械/智能制造为分化观望至明显劝退。该校在宁夏物理类招生专业以机械类（车辆/智能制造）、土木类、化工与制药类、环境科学与工程类等传统工科为主，热门专业（计算机类仅2人、电子信息类4人）占比较低，整体专业结构偏传统，可能抑制高分考生报考意愿。宁夏2026年高考总人数约66000人，与2025年（约65897人）基本持平，竞争规模稳定；武汉理工大学位于湖北武汉，在宁夏属跨省招生。该校在宁夏的招生人数占比较小（2025年物理类33人），地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4704名、2026年扩招2人（+6.1%）、学校声誉偏负面、专业结构偏传统工科等因素：扩招使竞争加剧（位次数字增大），但声誉偏负面及专业热度偏冷对高分考生吸引力有限，两者相互对冲。预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基础上小幅后移，预测最低位次约4905名，区间4405–5405名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest ranking for science was approximately 2428, in 2023 about 2828, in 2024 due to batch merger and exam mode adjustment, there was an abnormal fluctuation to about 9966, and in 2025 it recovered to about 4704 (Physics Category). The rankings over the past three years show an overall backward trend, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being about 4704; the enrollment plan for this university in Ningxia for science/physics category: 31 in 2022, 31 in 2023, 28 in 2024, 33 in 2025, and 35 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an expansion of 2 students (+6.1%), a moderate expansion that somewhat intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 54th, with a stable and slightly rising ranking in recent years (55 in 2021 → 48 in 2025 → 54 in 2026), belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (unidentified giant biological activity detected around the Nanhu campus), which may mildly suppress candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 98 (average), with low exposure on short video platforms and no obvious popularity boost; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Materials Science and Engineering was rated A, Transportation Engineering and Mechanical Engineering were rated A-. Materials science is the flagship discipline of this university, directly corresponding to majors such as Materials, Mechanical, and Transportation in the enrollment, which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Computer, Electronics/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended; Civil Engineering/Architecture, Biology/Chemistry/Environment/Materials, and Mechanical/Intelligent Manufacturing are in a state of differentiation from wait-and-see to obvious discouragement. The university's enrollment in Ningxia for the Physics Category mainly includes traditional engineering majors such as Mechanical (Vehicle/Intelligent Manufacturing), Civil Engineering, Chemical and Pharmaceutical, and Environmental Science and Engineering, with a low proportion of popular majors (Computer only 2, Electronics 4), making the overall major structure relatively traditional, which may suppress the willingness of high-scoring candidates to apply. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Ningxia college entrance examination is about 66,000, basically the same as 2025 (about 65,897), with stable competition scale; Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and is a cross-provincial enrollment in Ningxia. The university's enrollment proportion in Ningxia is relatively small (33 in Physics Category in 2025), so regional preference has a limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4704, the 2026 expansion of 2 students (+6.1%), the slightly negative reputation, and the traditional engineering major structure: the expansion intensifies competition (ranking number increases), but the slightly negative reputation and relatively cold major popularity limit appeal to high-scoring candidates, offsetting each other. It is expected that the lowest admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward from 2025, with a predicted lowest ranking of about 4905, and a range of 4405–5405.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 4405–5405, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, sprint for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4405), focus on sprinting for popular majors like Computer and Electronics; if the ranking is in the middle of the range (around 4905), it is recommended to focus on advantageous discipline majors like Materials and Mechanical; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>5405), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors for safety. The university's Materials Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline, and although it belongs to the Biology/Chemistry/Environment/Materials category, as a flagship major, it still offers high cost-effectiveness.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 977; in 2023, about 792; in 2024, about 703; in 2025, about 1069 (history category). Over the past four years, rankings fluctuated with an initial rise and then a decline: from 2022 to 2024, rankings moved forward year by year (ranking numbers decreased), while in 2025, rankings significantly moved backward (ranking numbers increased). The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1069. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Ningxia: 5 students in 2022, 5 in 2023, 8 in 2024, 7 in 2025, and 5 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 2 students (-28.6%), a significant reduction, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; it ranks about 54th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings. It is known for engineering, with a relatively small scale of liberal arts programs, but still attractive due to its 211 platform. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents, which have a relatively limited impact on liberal arts candidates' application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranks 98th (average), with no significant popularity boost. The university's liberal arts-related discipline evaluations: Marxist Theory is not independently rated; Law, Economics, Journalism and Communication, etc., have not reached A- or above. Liberal arts advantages are not prominent, but the 211 platform still attracts liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Law is divided and wait-and-see (both recommended and discouraged), Economics/Finance is divided and wait-and-see, and Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. The university's enrollment majors in Ningxia's history category are Law, Business Administration, Network and New Media, and Economics. Among them, Law still has popularity, while Network and New Media (Journalism and Communication category) has low popularity. The total number of candidates in Ningxia for 2026 is about 66,000, with the history category estimated at about 21,450, roughly the same as 2025 (21,406). Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and recruits across provinces in Ningxia. The number of liberal arts students is small (5-8), and regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1069, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 2 students (-28.6%), historical ranking fluctuations, etc.: the reduction eases competition (ranking numbers decrease), but the 2025 ranking has already significantly moved backward compared to 2024, and Law among liberal arts majors still has popularity. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 901, and a range of 739-1063.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<739), you can aim for Law. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 901), it is recommended to focus on Economics or Business Administration. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>1063), consider Network and New Media as a safety.
